ques: Check the New York Jets Depth Chart in the NFL section of ESPN and identify the players listed as injured in the 2ND position.
answer: In the 2ND position column of the NY Jets depth chart, the players carrying an injury designation are Cade Klubnik (QB – Q/Questionable), Jarvis Brownlee Jr. (NB – Q/Questionable), and Cade York (PK – Q/Questionable).
